parameters.subject: FM Matrix Research Agent — Slow news week ({{ $now.format('dd MMM yyyy') }})
parameters.message:
Hi,

The research agent ran today but did not find any high-relevance items across industry news, competitor activity, reviews, regulatory updates, or hiring signals.

This may be a genuinely slow news week. No research document has been created for this cycle.

The agent will run again on the next scheduled date.

— FM Matrix Research Agent

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "mistralai/mistral-large",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are a senior content strategist for FM Matrix, a B2B SaaS Facilities Management platform for India and GCC markets. You produce weekly research documents for a content calendar manager who plans LinkedIn posts for the FM Matrix Product Showcase page.

FM Matrix LinkedIn voice rules:
- Outcome-led, not feature-led
- Peer-to-peer tone — talking with FM professionals, not at them
- Every post anchored in data or a customer story
- Direct, active voice. No corporate jargon.
- BANNED words: best-in-class, cutting-edge, revolutionary, solution, leverage, synergy, seamlessly

Target groups:
- TG1: Commercial Real Estate Developers and IT Park Operators (India) — buyer: Head of Property Management / VP Facilities
- TG2: Integrated Facility Management (IFM) Service Companies (India) — buyer: COO / Head of Operations
- TG3: GCC Commercial Real Estate and Free Zone Operators — buyer: FM Director / Head of Asset Management

FM Matrix proof points to reference where relevant:
- CAM billing cycle reduced from 12 days to 2 days at a 50-tenant commercial complex
- Compliance lapse rate fell from 22% to 0% across 8 sites
- Vendor SLA compliance rose from 62% to 91% across 12 managed sites
- Safety incidents fell 86% at a pharma manufacturing campus
- Tenant NPS increased from +18 to +52 at a co-working operator
- FM operating cost fell 25% at a 300,000 sq ft SEZ campus

Return ONLY valid markdown, no JSON wrapper, no preamble."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Using the research intelligence below, produce a structured weekly research document for the FM Matrix content calendar manager.

RESEARCH INPUTS:
{{ JSON.stringify($input.all()) }}

Produce the document using EXACTLY this structure:

# FM Matrix Content Intelligence — Week of {{ $now.format('dd MMM yyyy') }}

> Prepared by Research Agent | {{ $now.toISO() }}

---

## This week's top 3 post opportunities

[List 3 highest-priority content angles. For each: angle in one sentence, why it's timely, which TG it targets, suggested format (Text / Image / Carousel)]

---

## Industry news

[For each relevant item: topic, summary, content angle, TG, urgency]

---

## Competitor activity

[For each competitor with signals: what the signal is, strategic implication, suggested FM Matrix response angle]

---

## What customers are saying

[Best verbatim quotes. For each: quote in blockquote format, pain it reveals, content angle]

---

## Regulatory updates

[For each update: regulation, what it means, who it affects, FM Matrix module that addresses it, urgency]

---

## Hiring signals

[Summary of competitor hiring patterns and what they signal strategically]

---

## Background intelligence

[Items useful as context but not time-sensitive for posting this week]

---

*End of report*"
    }
  ]
}

parameters.subject: =FM Matrix Content Intelligence — Week of {{ $now.format('dd MMM yyyy') }} is ready
parameters.message:
=

This week's content research is ready

Hi,

The FM Matrix research agent has completed this week's intelligence run. Your research document is ready to review.

Sources checked this cycle:

✓ Industry news and trends

✓ Competitor activity

✓ User review insights

✓ Regulatory updates (India and GCC)

✓ Competitor hiring signals

View Research Document

The document includes this week's top 3 post opportunities, competitor intelligence, regulatory updates, and customer insight angles tagged by TG1, TG2, and TG3.

— FM Matrix Research Agent
